show_look.reference: Roger Deakins / Blade Runner 2049 (2017) + Sicario (2015) + Children of Men (2006)
show_look.grade_intent: Desaturated cold teals and deep blacks throughout. Warm amber practicals as the only warmth — always motivated, never decorative. Crushed blacks below 5% IRE. Highlights rolled off above 80%. No blown-out whites except intentional flash events.
forbidden: Saturated colours (>30% saturation except motivated neon signs)
Overhead fill light — zero ambient fills in interiors
Warm daylight >4000K unless it is a motivated practical

per_scene_grade.SCN_001: Cold and near-black — searchbeam only warm exception. Dominant #0A1520.
per_scene_grade.SCN_002: Amber warm dominant — single cage lamp in distance. Dominant #1C2B35.
per_scene_grade.SCN_003: Green-white strobe — most aggressive contrast in episode. Dominant #1A2215.
per_scene_grade.SCN_004: Amber intimate — smallest warmest space in episode. Dominant #1E1510.
per_scene_grade.SCN_005: Cold clinical — no warmth permitted. Dominant #C8D0D0.
per_scene_grade.SCN_006: Amber/cyan dual — visual chaos of the underground. Dominant #2A1A0A.
per_scene_grade.SCN_007: Cold cyan — coldest space in episode. Dominant #0D1B2A.
per_scene_grade.SCN_008: Green teal — tunnel, NVG register. Dominant #0A150A.
per_scene_grade.SCN_009: Red warm vs cold blue — war of two sources at the threshold. Dominant #1A0505.
per_scene_grade.SCN_010: Red alarm + cold weapon lights — pursuit palette. Dominant #0A150A.
per_scene_grade.SCN_011: Cold blue pre-dawn — stripping warmth from the apartment. Dominant #12100E.
